# SpaceX Dashboard

A React + Vite app that displays SpaceX data and statistics using the public SpaceX API.

## Stack
- React (Vite)
- JavaScript
- SpaceX REST API (https://api.spacexdata.com/v4)

## Features
- Next upcoming launch
- Launch history and counts (e.g. launches this year)
- Rocket statistics
- Mission details

## Dev Guidelines
- Call the SpaceX API directly from the browser (no backend needed)
- Keep components small and focused
- Use fetch() or axios for API calls
